'''lothafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadradic|quadradic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-th-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadradic|quadradic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lothafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lothafithi|lothafithi]] || [[word:lothafiji|lothafiji]] || [[word:lothafishi|lothafishi]] || [[word:lothafiki|lothafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lothafuthuthu|lothafuthuthu]] || [[word:lothafujuju|lothafujuju]] || [[word:lothafushushu|lothafushushu]] || [[word:lothafukuku|lothafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lothafuthu|lothafuthu]] || [[word:lothafuju|lothafuju]] || [[word:lothafushu|lothafushu]] || [[word:lothafuku|lothafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lothafufthuf|lothafufthuf]] || [[word:lothafufjuf|lothafufjuf]] || [[word:lothafufshuf|lothafufshuf]] || [[word:lothafufkuf|lothafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lothafethe|lothafethe]] || [[word:lothafeje|lothafeje]] || [[word:lothafeshe|lothafeshe]] || [[word:lothafeke|lothafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lothafothotho|lothafothotho]] || [[word:lothafojojo|lothafojojo]] || [[word:lothafoshosho|lothafoshosho]] || [[word:lothafokoko|lothafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lothafotho|lothafotho]] || [[word:lothafojo|lothafojo]] || [[word:lothafosho|lothafosho]] || [[word:lothafoko|lothafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lothafofthof|lothafofthof]] || [[word:lothafofjof|lothafofjof]] || [[word:lothafofshof|lothafofshof]] || [[word:lothafofkof|lothafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lothafïfthïf|lothafïfthïf]] || [[word:lothafïfjïf|lothafïfjïf]] || [[word:lothafïfshïf|lothafïfshïf]] || [[word:lothafïfkïf|lothafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lothafïfthïfthïf|lothafïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:lothafïfjïfjïf|lothafïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:lothafïfshïfshïf|lothafïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:lothafïfkïfkïf|lothafïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lothafïfthïf|lothafïfthïf]] || [[word:lothafïfjïf|lothafïfjïf]] || [[word:lothafïfshïf|lothafïfshïf]] || [[word:lothafïfkïf|lothafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lothafïfthïf|lothafïfthïf]] || [[word:lothafïfjïf|lothafïfjïf]] || [[word:lothafïfshïf|lothafïfshïf]] || [[word:lothafïfkïf|lothafïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lothafæthæ|lothafæthæ]] || [[word:lothafæjæ|lothafæjæ]] || [[word:lothafæshæ|lothafæshæ]] || [[word:lothafækæ|lothafækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lothafathatha|lothafathatha]] || [[word:lothafajaja|lothafajaja]] || [[word:lothafashasha|lothafashasha]] || [[word:lothafakaka|lothafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lothafatha|lothafatha]] || [[word:lothafaja|lothafaja]] || [[word:lothafasha|lothafasha]] || [[word:lothafaka|lothafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lothafafthaf|lothafafthaf]] || [[word:lothafafjaf|lothafafjaf]] || [[word:lothafafshaf|lothafafshaf]] || [[word:lothafafkaf|lothafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lothafasha|lothafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lothafshësha|lothafshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lothafrosha|lothafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lothafmusha|lothafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lothafyasha|lothafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golothafnkshësha|golothafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golothafnkrosha|golothafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golothafnkmusha|golothafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golothafnkyasha|golothafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lothathafasha|lothathafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lothathafshësha|lothathafshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lothathafrosha|lothathafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lothathafmusha|lothathafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lothathafyasha|lothathafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golothathafnkshësha|golothathafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golothathafnkrosha|golothathafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golothathafnkmusha|golothathafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golothathafnkyasha|golothathafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:lethæfasha|lethæfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lethæfshësha|lethæfshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lethæfrosha|lethæfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lethæfmusha|lethæfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lethæfyasha|lethæfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golethæfnkshësha|golethæfnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golethæfnkrosha|golethæfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golethæfnkmusha|golethæfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golethæfnkyasha|golethæfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lothfafasha|lothfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lothfafshësha|lothfafshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lothfafrosha|lothfafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lothfafmusha|lothfafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lothfafyasha|lothfafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golothfafnkshësha|golothfafnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golothfafnkrosha|golothfafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golothfafnkmusha|golothfafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golothfafnkyasha|golothfafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|bfc4f79}}
